parameters.subject: =Task Due Reminder (24 Hours): {{$json.task_title}}

parameters.query:
SELECT
  t.id                    AS task_id,
  t.title                 AS task_title,
  t.target_date           AS task_due_date,
  t.status                AS task_status,

  -- hours remaining
  TIMESTAMPDIFF(
    HOUR,
    UTC_TIMESTAMP(),
    t.target_date
  )                       AS hours_remaining,

  -- task owner
  rp.email                AS task_owner_email,
  rp.firstname            AS task_owner_firstname,
  rp.lastname            AS task_owner_lastname,

  -- project info (optional but useful in email)
  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title

FROM task_managements t

-- task owner
JOIN spree_users rp
  ON rp.id = t.responsible_person_id

-- project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = t.project_management_id

WHERE
  t.status NOT IN ('completed', 'closed')
  AND t.target_date > UTC_TIMESTAMP()                     -- not overdue
  AND t.target_date <= UTC_TIMESTAMP() + INTERVAL 40 HOUR; -- due in next 24 hrs

mySql.name: New FM UAT Task Management Database
